title: Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory
description: Get in touch with a public information officer from Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory and learn about the news beats we cover.
text:
The Role of the Office of Strategic Communications
The Office of Strategic Communications (OSC) is the primary contact between the Laboratory, the news media and the public. OSC prepares news releases, media advisories, statements on behalf of Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory (LLNL), news and feature articles, fact sheets, brochures and other publications about the Laboratory’s work. OSC also:
Responds to news media and community inquiries
Arranges media visits and tours of the Laboratory
Schedules talks and interactive demonstrations featuring LLNL researchers
osc [at] llnl.gov (osc[at]llnl[dot]gov)
